  -f, --file              Path to the file to be parsed.

  -u, --url               URL from which text will be downloaded for parsing.

  -n, --header-name       (Default: Authorization) HTTP header name for
                          authentication.

  -t, --header-token      HTTP header token for authentication.

  -p, --policies          comma-separated list of policies to apply to the
                          schema.

  -r, --roles             comma-separated list of roles to apply to the schema.

  --validations           (Default: false) print out any validation errors

  --unique-constraints    (Default: false) Prints all the unique constrains as a
                          comma separated list.

  --format                (Default: Ansi) Set the output format. Options: Ansi,
                          Csv

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
